app.name: Kelva
app.audience_constraint: Global. App shipped in 5 languages (DE / EN / ES / FR / IT). §437 / §438 BGB warranty auto-calc is a DE-law bonus; the core product works in every market.
app.live_status: App Store live since May 2026 (Apple-approved), all 5 languages shipped

short.tagline: Mail-inbox-connected receipt, warranty and subscription manager. Shipped in 5 languages.
short.what_it_is: Kelva is an iOS + Android app that digitally manages receipts, warranties and subscriptions. Users connect mail addresses (read-only), incoming mail lands in Kelva, gets parsed by AI or manual scan, classified (invoice, warranty, subscription, contract), with reminders. The overview holds all receipts, warranties and subs in one place, plus household sharing for families.
short.who_for: Adults 25-55 worldwide managing device inventory, warranties and subscriptions for themselves or their household. Consumer-conscious, mildly DIY, family- or partner-led households.
key_features: Mail-inbox parsing: AI auto-classifies invoices, warranties, subs from read-only mail addresses.
Receipt + warranty + subscription overview filterable by category, device or vendor.
Push reminders 30 / 7 / 1 day before warranty expires or subscription auto-renews.
§437 / §438 BGB warranty auto-calc (DE-law bonus); manufacturer-warranty lookup elsewhere.
Household sharing: shared family inbox, priorities split per member.
business_model_lines: Single revenue stream: annual Premium subscription.
Pricing: 29.99 USD / year (no monthly plan).
Free tier generous: manual entry, photo scan, reminders, Snap-to-Done, §438 auto-calc (DE), household sharing.
Premium unlocks: AI email-inbound classification + advanced family features.
Languages live: DE / EN / ES / FR / IT.
short.attribution_one_paragraph: Your link kelva.space/i/[handle] works on every platform. Android attribution is deterministic via Google's install-referrer. iOS warm installs use Universal Links. iOS cold (~99% of creator traffic) uses our own signed-token clipboard deferred-deeplink — live-verified, no Branch.io. RevenueCat fires on Premium purchase and 50% of net revenue is credited to your handle for 24 months.
short.see_long_pointer: For the full attribution walkthrough — why DIY, how each install path works, payout pipeline, security model — see the Extended Brief PDF in this folder.

long.tagline: Mail-inbox-connected receipt, warranty and subscription manager. Shipped in 5 languages.
long.what_it_is: Kelva is an iOS + Android app that digitally manages receipts, warranties and subscriptions. The user connects multiple mail addresses (read-only), incoming mail lands in Kelva, gets parsed by AI or quick manual scan, classified (invoice, warranty, subscription, contract), with reminders set. The overview holds all receipts, warranties and subs in one place, plus an optional vault for important documents. With household sharing, a family opens a shared inbox — everyone sees what is going on, priorities split, nothing falls through the cracks.
long.who_for: Adults 25-55 worldwide who manage device inventory, warranties and recurring subscriptions for themselves or their household. Audience skews consumer-conscious, mildly DIY, family- or partner-led. Creator archetypes that convert well: personal-finance / savings-tip creators, family-organisation IGers, lifehack TikTokers in any of the 5 app languages, consumer-law explainers (DE lawyer-TikTok around §437/§438 BGB, general consumer-protection elsewhere), small tech reviewers, parent/family-mom influencers.
key_features: Mail-inbox parsing: connect multiple mail addresses read-only, AI auto-classifies; or manual photo scan.
Receipt + warranty + subscription overview filterable by category, device or vendor.
Push reminders: 30 / 7 / 1 day before warranty expires or subscription auto-renews.
§437 / §438 BGB warranty auto-calc (DE-law bonus); manufacturer lookup elsewhere.
Household sharing: shared family inbox, priorities split per member.
Document vault + Snap-to-Done: store warranty PDFs / manuals / contracts; tap once to mark handled.
business_model_lines: Single revenue stream: annual Premium subscription.
Free tier generous: manual entry, photo scan, reminders, Snap-to-Done, §438 auto-calc (DE), household sharing.
Premium unlocks: AI email-inbound classification (off / warranty-only / all) + advanced family features.
Free Lifetime Premium for onboarded affiliates, no posting obligation.
Languages live: DE / EN / ES / FR / IT.
pricing_lines: 29.99 USD / year, no monthly plan currently.
No free trial — generous free tier replaces it.
ASC live since May 2026; affiliate share is always 50% of the then-current price.
long.market_gap: Receipts + warranties + subscriptions are three separate problems most apps treat in isolation. Sub-trackers (Bobby, Subby, Truebill) handle subscriptions but ignore warranties. Receipt apps (Smart Receipts) scan paper but don't read your inbox. Warranty trackers (Centriq, Warranty Manager) feel abandoned and cover only registered devices. The real pain is one person juggling all three across an overflowing Gmail, a shoebox of paper receipts and a paid sub they only notice when it debits. Mail-inbox parsing as the input mechanism — read-only multi-mailbox connection with AI sorting — is the unlock. Household-sharing on top makes Kelva specifically a family product instead of personal.
long.business_model_why_now: Two shifts make Kelva possible in 2026. First, Vision and LLM costs dropped enough that classifying every inbound email per user is economically viable at 30 USD/year price point — three years ago it would have cost more than the subscription. Second, EU mail providers have stabilised IMAP read-only OAuth flows for third-party access, so we connect multiple inboxes without scary password-handover or breaking when providers rotate auth tokens.
long.why_this_works: Expired warranties and forgotten subs cost real money in every market — not a DACH-only problem. The mail-inbox parsing demo is visually strong in any language. The §437 / §438 BGB auto-calc is a real DE-specific bonus that lawyer-TikToker types demo concretely; non-DE audiences get the generic consumer-protection angle. 29.99 USD annual converts at above-average rates because the alternative (one missed warranty claim = 200-500 EUR lost) is concrete and remembered.

short.tagline: Mail-Inbox-vernetzter Beleg-, Garantie- und Abo-Manager. In 5 Sprachen shipped.
short.what_it_is: Kelva ist eine iOS + Android-App, die Belege, Garantien und Abos digital managed. User verbinden Mail-Adressen (read-only), eingehende Mails landen in Kelva, werden per KI oder manuellem Scan ausgelesen, klassifiziert (Rechnung, Garantie, Abo, Vertrag), mit Remindern. Die Übersicht hält alle Belege, Garantien und Abos an einem Ort, plus Haushalts-Sharing für Familien.
short.who_for: Erwachsene 25-55 weltweit die Geräte-Inventar, Garantien und Abos für sich oder ihren Haushalt managen. Verbraucher-bewusst, mild DIY, familien- oder partner-geführte Haushalte.
key_features: Mail-Inbox-Parsing: KI klassifiziert Rechnungen, Garantien, Abos automatisch aus read-only Mail-Adressen.
Beleg- + Garantie- + Abo-Übersicht filterbar nach Kategorie, Gerät, Anbieter.
Push-Reminder 30 / 7 / 1 Tag vor Garantie-Ablauf oder Abo-Verlängerung.
§437 / §438 BGB Garantie-Auto-Kalkulation (DE-Recht-Bonus); Hersteller-Garantie-Lookup sonst.
Haushalts-Sharing: gemeinsame Familien-Inbox, Prioritäten pro Mitglied.
business_model_lines: Einzelne Revenue-Quelle: Jahres-Premium-Subscription.
Pricing: 29,99 USD / Jahr (kein Monats-Plan).
Free-Tier großzügig: manuelle Eingabe, Foto-Scan, Reminder, Snap-to-Done, §438 Auto-Kalk (DE), Haushalts-Sharing.
Premium schaltet frei: KI-Email-Inbound-Klassifikation + erweiterte Familien-Features.
Sprachen live: DE / EN / ES / FR / IT.
short.attribution_one_paragraph: Dein Link kelva.space/i/[handle] funktioniert auf jeder Plattform. Android-Attribution deterministisch via Google Install-Referrer. iOS warm nutzt Universal Links. iOS cold (~99% Creator-Traffic) nutzt unseren eigenen signed-Token Clipboard-Deferred-Deeplink — live-verifiziert, kein Branch.io. RevenueCat feuert beim Premium-Kauf und 50% des Netto-Umsatzes werden deinem Handle für 24 Monate gutgeschrieben.
short.see_long_pointer: Für das volle Attribution-Walkthrough — warum DIY, wie jeder Install-Pfad funktioniert, Payout-Pipeline, Sicherheits-Modell — siehe das Extended Brief PDF in diesem Ordner.

long.tagline: Mail-Inbox-vernetzter Beleg-, Garantie- und Abo-Manager. In 5 Sprachen shipped.
long.what_it_is: Kelva ist eine iOS + Android-App, die Belege, Garantien und Abos digital managed. Der User verbindet mehrere Mail-Adressen (read-only), eingehende Mails landen in Kelva, werden per KI oder schnellem manuellen Scan ausgelesen, klassifiziert (Rechnung, Garantie, Abo, Vertrag), mit Remindern. Die Übersicht hält alle Belege, Garantien und Abos an einem Ort, plus optionalem Tresor für wichtige Dokumente. Mit Haushalts-Sharing eröffnet eine Familie eine gemeinsame Inbox — jeder sieht was läuft, Prioritäten teilen sich auf, nichts geht mehr durch die Lappen.
long.who_for: Erwachsene 25-55 weltweit die Geräte-Inventar, Garantien und wiederkehrende Abos für sich oder ihren Haushalt managen. Verbraucher-bewusst, mild DIY, familien- oder partner-geführt. Passende Creator-Archetypen: Personal-Finance- / Spartipp-Creator, Familien-Organisations-IGer, Lifehack-TikToker in jeder der 5 App-Sprachen, Verbraucherrecht-Erklärer (DE Anwalt-TikTok rund um §437/§438 BGB, sonst Verbraucherschutz allgemein), kleine Tech-Reviewer, Parent-/Family-Mom-Influencer.
key_features: Mail-Inbox-Parsing: mehrere Mail-Adressen read-only verbinden, KI klassifiziert automatisch; oder manueller Foto-Scan.
Beleg- + Garantie- + Abo-Übersicht filterbar nach Kategorie, Gerät, Anbieter.
Push-Reminder: 30 / 7 / 1 Tag vor Garantie-Ablauf oder Abo-Verlängerung.
§437 / §438 BGB Garantie-Auto-Kalk (DE-Recht-Bonus); Hersteller-Lookup sonst.
Haushalts-Sharing: gemeinsame Familien-Inbox, Prioritäten pro Mitglied.
Dokumente-Tresor + Snap-to-Done: Garantie-PDFs / Manuals / Verträge speichern; ein Tap markiert als erledigt.
business_model_lines: Einzelne Revenue-Quelle: Jahres-Premium-Subscription.
Free-Tier großzügig: manuelle Eingabe, Foto-Scan, Reminder, Snap-to-Done, §438 Auto-Kalk (DE), Haushalts-Sharing.
Premium schaltet frei: KI-Email-Inbound-Klassifikation (off / warranty-only / all) + erweiterte Familien-Features.
Free Lifetime Premium für onboarded Affiliates, kein Posting-Zwang.
Sprachen live: DE / EN / ES / FR / IT.
pricing_lines: Keine Free-Trial — großzügiges Free-Tier ersetzt sie.
ASC live seit Mai 2026; Affiliate-Share ist immer 50% des aktuellen Preises.
long.market_gap: Belege + Garantien + Abos sind drei separate Probleme, die die meisten Apps isoliert behandeln. Sub-Tracker (Bobby, Subby, Truebill) handhaben Abos, ignorieren Garantien. Beleg-Apps (Smart Receipts) scannen Papier, lesen aber kein Postfach. Garantie-Tracker (Centriq, Warranty Manager) fühlen sich verlassen an und decken nur registrierte Geräte ab. Der echte Pain ist eine Person, die alle drei in einem überquellenden Gmail, einem Schuhkarton mit Belegen und einem bezahlten Abo, das nur durch die Buchung auffällt, jongliert. Mail-Inbox-Parsing als Input-Mechanismus — read-only Multi-Postfach-Verbindung mit KI-Sortierung — ist der Unlock. Haushalts-Sharing obendrauf macht Kelva spezifisch zu einem Familien-Produkt statt persönlich.
long.business_model_why_now: Zwei Verschiebungen machen Kelva 2026 möglich. Erstens, Vision- und LLM-Kosten sind genug gefallen dass jede Inbound-Email pro User zu klassifizieren ökonomisch tragbar ist beim 30-USD/Jahr-Preispunkt — vor drei Jahren hätte es mehr als die Subscription gekostet. Zweitens, EU-Mail-Provider haben die IMAP-Read-Only-OAuth-Flows für Third-Party-Zugriff stabilisiert, sodass wir mehrere Inboxen ohne riskante Passwort-Übergabe oder Auth-Token-Rotation-Breakage verbinden können.
long.why_this_works: Abgelaufene Garantien und vergessene Abos kosten in jedem Markt echtes Geld — kein DACH-only-Problem. Die Mail-Inbox-Parsing-Demo ist visuell stark in jeder Sprache. Die §437 / §438 BGB Auto-Kalk ist ein echter DE-spezifischer Bonus, den Anwalt-TikToker konkret demonstrieren; nicht-DE-Audiences bekommen den generischen Verbraucherschutz-Angle. 29,99 USD jährlich konvertiert überdurchschnittlich weil die Alternative (eine verpasste Garantie-Geltendmachung = 200-500 EUR weg) konkret und erinnert ist.

en.subtitle: for consumer / savings / lifehack creators — and what the research says about how to pitch it
en.hero_quote: Connect mail inbox, app parses receipts automatically. Earn from content your audience already needs.
en.sixty_seconds_intro: Kelva is an iOS + Android app that digitally manages receipts, warranties and subscriptions. You connect multiple mail addresses (read-only), incoming mail lands in Kelva, gets parsed by AI or manual scan, you classify it and set reminders. Overview holds all receipts, warranties and subs in one place. Household sharing opens a shared family inbox. Shipped in DE / EN / ES / FR / IT.
en.why_this_works: Overflowing inboxes, subs you only notice when they debit, warranty receipts in a shoebox. Three messes, no overview — in any country. Kelva is the single place that does all three.
free_vs_premium: Free: manual entry, photo scan, reminders, Snap-to-Done, §438 auto-calc (DE), manufacturer lookup, household sharing.
Premium (29.99 USD/year): AI email-inbound classification + advanced family features.
Free Lifetime Premium for onboarded affiliates.
en.creator_types_intro: Use this table as a first-pass match. Find the row that sounds most like you, see which path (UGC vs faceless) historically converts best for that archetype.

creator_types_table.hooks: "The 1 year warranty clock you keep forgetting"; "§437 BGB in three sentences"; reaction-style consumer-rights explainer
creator_types_table.expected_conversion: 2-4% views→install, lawyer trust is very high

creator_types_table.hooks: "I missed 280 EUR last month"; "the 5 subs you forgot you pay"; "how I cut my subs from 47 to 12"
"How our family inbox actually works"; "the dryer broke at month 18"; household-sharing demo with real family
creator_types_table.expected_conversion: 2-4%, family content has very high trust + share rate

creator_types_table.hooks: Mail-inbox screen-rec demo; "app turns mail chaos into a list"; warranty-deadline countdown slide
creator_types_table.expected_conversion: 0.5-1.5% per view, high posting cadence scales

creator_types_table.hooks: "App that tracks the warranty on every device"; receipt-vault tour; reminder-flow demo
Region-specific consumer-protection; "the warranty law that protects you nobody told you about"

ugc_strategy.archetype: You on camera. Lawyer-TikToker in a quiet office. Savings-coach at the kitchen table opening a real bill. Family-mom showing the shared inbox with your actual partner. The product is a 5-10 second beat inside YOUR story. Sokolova and Kefi (2020) found parasocial trust is what moves consumer-rights and money-adjacent audiences specifically.
hook_examples: "I lost 280 EUR last month to an expired warranty" — talking head, your honest tone, then phone showing the deadline screen.
"§437 BGB — three sentences most people don't know" (DE) or "the warranty clock you keep forgetting" (EN/ES/FR/IT).
"How our family inbox actually works" — kitchen scene with partner/kids, you opening the shared overview.
"Subs I didn't know I was paying" — selfie, you scrolling through the sub list, real reaction.
"What happens when your dryer breaks after 18 months" — scenario, with/without Kelva.
"How I cut my subs from 47 to 12 in one weekend" — process story.
"Year-one Kelva: honest review" — straight-to-camera 60s.
"The 1-tap claim letter" — tease the roadmap, don't promise as live.
format_templates: Talking-head 30s: direct to camera, your honest take, app screen as B-roll.
Vlog 60-90s: real scenario (a bill arrives, a warranty expires) → Kelva moment → outcome.
Family demo: partner/kids on camera with you.
Case-study carousel narrated: 6-slide IG with your voice, last slide = link.
Reaction style: you discover a sub you forgot, real reaction caught on cam.
do_dont: Do: vertical, eye-level, natural light.
Do: name a real receipt / sub / device. Specificity reads honest.
Do: put the link in caption AND a story sticker.
Don't: read marketing copy out loud.
Don't: give specific legal advice through Kelva (BORA risk in DE for lawyers).
Don't: oversell. "I missed 280 EUR last month, this would have caught it" outperforms superlatives.

faceless_strategy.archetype: Voiceover + screen-recording + mail-inbox-parses-receipt B-roll. Lifehack-TikToker. Tutorial carousel creator. The mail-inbox parsing does the demo work. Kelva's screen-rec moment (email arrives, AI classifies, reminder set) is unusually clean.
hook_examples: "Mail in, app parses everything" — 30s pure screen-rec.
"B-roll family inbox + voiceover" — 45s shoebox of receipts + overflowing mail, cut to Kelva.
"Excel vs Kelva" — 30s split-screen, 47-device Excel vs Kelva family inbox.
"Warranty-deadline explainer" — locale-adapted: §437 BGB (DE), 1-year clock (EN), garantie légale (FR), garantía legal (ES), garanzia legale (IT).
"5 apps every household needs" — Kelva on slide 1, listicle.
"How I claimed back a 320 EUR warranty" — case-study carousel.
"Subscription cleanup process" — 60s screen-rec.
"Mail-inbox parsing time-lapse" — sped-up AI demo, captions only.
format_templates: Screen-record demo 20-30s.
Tutorial carousel: 6 slides, slide 6 = affiliate link.
Voiceover narrative 45s.
Listicle: "5 apps every household needs" with Kelva #1-2.
Case-study carousel: 6-slide warranty-claim story, slide 6 = link.
Faceless lawyer-explainer: warranty-law deck with voiceover, no face on camera.
do_dont: Do: make the demo self-explanatory.
Do: post more often. Lifehack faceless scales.
Do: caption every step.
Do: localise the warranty-law angle.
Don't: fake-enthusiastic narration.
Don't: skip the link in caption + bio.

audience_fit_good: Family-organisation IGers (very high trust + share rate).
Lifehack creators in any of the 5 app languages.
Consumer-law explainers: lawyer-TikToker (DE §437/§438; EN/ES/FR/IT consumer-protection generic).
audience_fit_poor: Pure aesthetic accounts without a practical-life angle.
en.posting_cadence: Consumer-lifehack audience: Sunday evening ("plan-the-week") and Wednesday evening ("midweek-organise"). Lawyer-TikToker: any day, edutainment 7-10pm local. Family-mom: weekend mornings + Sunday evenings. 1 reel per week. Stories with link sticker on weekends bring most conversions.
en.conversion_math: 50% rev share, 24 months. Premium 29.99 USD/year. Lawyer-TikToker (50k followers): 25,000 views x 2% CTR = 500 clicks, 30% install = 150 installs, 8% Premium = 12 subs, ~180 USD per reel. Savings-tip Mid-tier (80k IG): 40,000 views x 1.5% CTR = 600 clicks, 30% install = 180 installs, 7% Premium = 13 subs, ~195 USD. Family-mom macro (300k IG): reach 120,000 x 1.2% CTR = 1,440 clicks, 25% install = 360 installs, 6% Premium = 22 subs, ~330 USD per post.
en.brand_assets: Logo, app screenshots, warranty-deadline explainer slides (locale-adapted), mail-inbox demo footage and ready-made captions: getklar.org/i/kelva/brand-assets.
faq: Which languages and markets does Kelva work in?
App shipped in DE / EN / ES / FR / IT. §437 / §438 BGB is a DE-law feature; core product works in every market. Affiliates from any country welcome.
Can I post in English (or ES / FR / IT)?
Yes. Pitch core product. For DE additionally lean on §437/§438. For non-DE use generic consumer-protection angle.
Lawyer compliance?
Educate generally (locale-appropriate). Do NOT give specific legal advice through Kelva (BORA risk in DE). "App calculates the deadline" fine. "App writes your claim letter" is roadmap.
Disclosure duty?
Yes. #ad / #sponsored / IG "Paid Partnership".
Flat fee on top?
Mid+ yes, 150-500 USD/EUR per reel. Macro 500-2,000 USD. Rev-share stays on top.
Premium pricing changes?
You earn 50% on the then-current price.
en.closing: Honest read: Kelva fits audiences who already think about receipts, warranties or recurring subs. Savings-tip, family-mom, lifehack, consumer-law explainers all fit. Lifestyle-aesthetic or pure-entertainment accounts where nobody cares about a missed warranty story do NOT fit. If your audience would shrug at a 280 EUR missed-warranty story, that's a real answer. Reply to Mail 2 either way.

de.subtitle: für Consumer- / Spar- / Lifehack-Creator — und was die Forschung über das Pitching sagt
de.hero_quote: Mail-Postfach verbinden, App parst Belege automatisch. Verdien an Content den deine Audience eh braucht.
de.sixty_seconds_intro: Kelva ist eine iOS + Android-App, die Belege, Garantien und Abos digital managed. Du verbindest mehrere Mail-Adressen (read-only), eingehende Mails landen in Kelva, werden per KI oder manuellem Scan ausgelesen, du klassifizierst sie und setzt Reminder. Die Übersicht hält alle Belege, Garantien und Abos an einem Ort. Haushalts-Sharing eröffnet gemeinsame Familien-Inbox. Shipped in DE / EN / ES / FR / IT.
de.why_this_works: Überquellende Postfächer, Abos die du nur durchs Abbuchen merkst, Garantie-Belege im Schuhkarton. Drei Unordnungen, keine Übersicht — in jedem Land. Kelva ist der eine Ort der alle drei macht.
free_vs_premium: Free: manuelle Eingabe, Foto-Scan, Reminder, Snap-to-Done, §438 Auto-Kalk (DE), Hersteller-Lookup, Haushalts-Sharing.
Free Lifetime Premium für onboarded Affiliates.
de.creator_types_intro: Nutze diese Tabelle als ersten Abgleich. Finde die Zeile die zu dir passt, schau welcher Pfad (UGC vs Faceless) historisch am besten konvertiert.

creator_types_table.hooks: "Die 1-Jahres-Garantie-Uhr die du immer vergisst"; "§437 BGB in drei Sätzen"; Reaction-Style Verbraucherrecht-Erklärer
"Ich habe letzten Monat 280 EUR verloren"; "die 5 Abos die du vergessen hast"; "wie ich meine Abos von 47 auf 12 gekürzt habe"
"Wie unsere Familien-Inbox tatsächlich läuft"; "der Trockner ging in Monat 18 kaputt"; Haushalts-Sharing-Demo mit echter Familie

Region-spezifischer Verbraucherschutz; "das Garantie-Recht das dich schützt das dir keiner gesagt hat"

ugc_strategy.archetype: Du vor der Kamera. Anwalt-TikToker im ruhigen Büro. Spar-Coach am Küchentisch der eine echte Rechnung öffnet. Family-Mom die gemeinsame Inbox mit echtem Partner zeigt. Das Produkt ist ein 5-10-Sekunden-Beat in DEINER Story. Sokolova und Kefi (2020) fanden, dass parasoziales Vertrauen Consumer-Rights- und geld-affine Audiences besonders bewegt.
hook_examples: "Ich habe letzten Monat 280 EUR durch eine abgelaufene Garantie verloren" — Talking Head, dein ehrlicher Ton, dann Handy mit Deadline-Screen.
"§437 BGB — drei Sätze die die meisten nicht kennen" (DE) oder "the warranty clock you keep forgetting" (EN/ES/FR/IT).
"Wie unsere Familien-Inbox tatsächlich läuft" — Küchen-Szene mit Partner/Kindern.
"Abos die ich nicht wusste dass ich zahle" — Selfie, du scrollst durch die Sub-Liste, echte Reaktion.
"Was passiert wenn dein Trockner nach 18 Monaten kaputt geht" — Szenario, mit/ohne Kelva.
"Wie ich meine Abos von 47 auf 12 in einem Wochenende gekürzt habe" — Prozess-Story.

"Das 1-Tap-Reklamationsschreiben" — Roadmap teasen, nicht als live versprechen.

Vlog 60-90s: echtes Szenario (Rechnung kommt, Garantie läuft ab) → Kelva-Moment → Outcome.
Family-Demo: Partner/Kinder mit dir vor der Kamera.

Do: einen echten Beleg / Abo / Gerät nennen. Spezifik liest sich ehrlich.
Do: Link in Caption UND Story-Sticker.
Don't: Marketing-Copy vorlesen.
Don't: konkrete Rechtsberatung im Kelva-Kontext (BORA-Risk in DE für Anwälte).
Don't: oversellen. "Ich habe letzten Monat 280 EUR verloren, das hätte es gefangen" schlägt Superlative.

hook_examples: "Mail rein, App parst alles" — 30s pure Screen-Rec.
"B-Roll Familien-Postfach + Voiceover" — 45s Schuhkarton mit Belegen + überquellende Mails, Cut zu Kelva.
"Excel vs Kelva" — 30s Split-Screen, 47-Geräte-Excel vs Kelva Familien-Inbox.
"Garantie-Frist-Erklärung" — locale-adapted: §437 BGB (DE), 1-year clock (EN), garantie légale (FR), garantía legal (ES), garanzia legale (IT).
"5 Apps die jeder Haushalt braucht" — Kelva auf Slide 1, Listicle.
"Wie ich 320 EUR Garantie zurückgeholt habe" — Case-Study-Carousel.
"Abo-Cleanup-Prozess" — 60s Screen-Rec.
"Mail-Inbox-Parsing-Time-Lapse" — sped-up KI-Demo, nur Captions.
format_templates: Screen-Record-Demo 20-30s.
Tutorial-Carousel: 6 Slides, Slide 6 = Affiliate-Link.
Voiceover-Narrative 45s.
Listicle: "5 Apps die jeder Haushalt braucht" mit Kelva #1-2.
Case-Study-Carousel: 6-Slide Garantie-Claim-Story, Slide 6 = Link.

do_dont: Do: mach die Demo selbsterklärend.
Do: poste öfter. Lifehack-Faceless skaliert.
Do: Caption jeden Schritt.
Do: lokalisiere den Garantie-Recht-Angle.
Don't: fake-begeisterte Narration.
Don't: Link in Caption + Bio überspringen.

de.posting_cadence: Consumer-Lifehack-Audience: Sonntag-Abend ("plan-die-Woche") und Mittwoch-Abend ("Midweek-Organize"). Anwalt-TikToker: jeden Tag, Edutainment 19-22h Lokal. Family-Mom: Wochenend-Morgen + Sonntag-Abend. 1 Reel pro Woche. Stories mit Link-Sticker am Wochenende bringen das Gros der Conversions.
de.conversion_math: 50% Rev-Share, 24 Monate. Premium 29,99 USD/Jahr. Anwalt-TikToker (50k Follower): 25.000 Views x 2% CTR = 500 Clicks, 30% Install = 150 Installs, 8% Premium = 12 Subs, ~180 USD pro Reel. Spar-Tipp Mid-Tier (80k IG): 40.000 Views x 1,5% CTR = 600 Clicks, 30% Install = 180 Installs, 7% Premium = 13 Subs, ~195 USD. Family-Mom Macro (300k IG): Reach 120.000 x 1,2% CTR = 1.440 Clicks, 25% Install = 360 Installs, 6% Premium = 22 Subs, ~330 USD pro Post.
de.brand_assets: Logo, App-Screenshots, Garantie-Frist-Explainer-Slides (locale-adaptiert), Mail-Inbox-Demo-Footage und fertige Captions: getklar.org/i/kelva/brand-assets.
faq: Welche Sprachen und Märkte deckt Kelva ab?
App in DE / EN / ES / FR / IT shipped. §437 / §438 BGB ist DE-Recht-Feature; Kern-Produkt funktioniert in jedem Markt. Affiliates aus jedem Land willkommen.
Kann ich auf Englisch (oder ES / FR / IT) posten?
Ja. Kern-Produkt pitchen. Für DE zusätzlich §437/§438. Für nicht-DE generischen Verbraucherschutz-Angle.
Anwalt-Compliance?
Allgemein educaten (locale-passend). KEINE konkrete Rechtsberatung im Kelva-Kontext (BORA-Risk in DE). "App rechnet die Frist aus" OK. "App schreibt dein Schreiben" ist Roadmap.
Kennzeichnungspflicht?
Ja. #ad / #Werbung / IG "Paid Partnership".
Flat-Fee on-top?
Mid+ ja, 150-500 USD/EUR pro Reel. Macro 500-2.000 USD. Rev-Share bleibt obendrauf.
Premium-Pricing-Änderung?
Du verdienst weiter 50% auf den jeweils aktuellen Preis.
de.closing: Ehrlich: Kelva passt zu Audiences, die schon über Belege, Garantien oder wiederkehrende Abos nachdenken. Spar-Tipp, Family-Mom, Lifehack, Verbraucherrechts-Erklärer passen alle. Lifestyle-Ästhetik oder reine Entertainment-Accounts, wo niemand sich für eine verpasste Garantie-Story interessiert, passen NICHT. Wenn deine Audience eine 280-EUR-verpasste-Garantie-Story mit den Schultern zucken würde, ist das eine ehrliche Antwort. Antworte auf Mail 2 so oder so.
